description: Pre-implementation coverage baseline for PG-181 (Help Article Editor Page). Frontend-heavy task that CREATES apps/web/src/app/settings/help-center/articles/new/page.tsx, apps/web/src/app/settings/help-center/articles/[id]/edit/page.tsx, apps/web/src/components/support/article-editor.tsx, apps/web/src/lib/support/article-editor-mapping.ts (+ their test files) and MODIFIES apps/api/src/modules/help-article/help-article.router.ts (adds a getById query). NOTE: the before-capture was recorded after the implementation existed (the build was done outside the formal /exec flow and reconciled retrospectively per the user-mandated protocol re-run); the NEW files are 0% by construction at the pre-task baseline and the MODIFIED router was already covered by its existing test suite. The AFTER snapshot (PG-181-after.json) is a fresh scoped vitest --coverage run.
command: Pre-impl baseline derived from origin/main (35bad9515). New files do not exist on origin/main — coverage of NEW code is 0% by construction at baseline. The MODIFIED help-article.router.ts is covered by the existing apps/api/src/modules/help-article/__tests__/help-article.router.test.ts (the getById additions add new cases to that suite). AFTER snapshot PG-181-after.json captures the post-impl scoped coverage at exec Phase 4.2.

lines.note: NEW files do not exist on origin/main — measured post-impl

apps/api/src/modules/help-article/help-a.note: Already covered by help-article.router.test.ts; PG-181 adds a getById query + new test cases.
